summary.final_report:
Investigation Summary

Seed: url http://youtubeaccount.com
Phase at stop: lateral_correlation
Iterations completed: 12
Stop reason: Safety iteration limit reached.

Key findings:
- Observed relation: url:http://youtubeaccount.com --has_vt_verdict--> verdict:malicious
- Observed relation: url:http://youtubeaccount.com --final_url--> url:http://ww38.youtubeaccount.com/
- Observed relation: url:http://youtubeaccount.com --final_domain--> domain:ww38.youtubeaccount.com
- Observed relation: url:http://youtubeaccount.com --resolves_to--> ip:185.53.177.29

Most productive pivots:
- https://yfdnza.com/?dn=youtubeaccount.com&pid=9po755g95: added 43 relations and 236 evidence items; new observables were mainly 5 engines, 2 hashs, 2 urls, 1 certificate, 1 domain, and 1 isp.
- http://ww38.youtubeaccount.com/: added 61 relations and 178 evidence items; new observables were mainly 3 hashs, 3 urls, and 2 ips.
- ob.sd559908.js.brandsmat.com: added 13 relations and 66 evidence items; new observables were mainly 3 categorys, 1 hostname, 1 ip, and 1 url.

Recurring lateral families:
- yfdnza.com: 1 expansions, 43 relations, 236 evidence items; observables included 5 engines, 2 hashs, 2 urls, 1 certificate, 1 domain, and 1 isp. Examples: https://yfdnza.com/?dn=youtubeaccount.com&pid=9po755g95.
- youtubeaccount.com: 1 expansions, 61 relations, 178 evidence items; observables included 3 hashs, 3 urls, and 2 ips. Examples: http://ww38.youtubeaccount.com/.
- brandsmat.com: 2 expansions, 23 relations, 130 evidence items; observables included 3 categorys, 2 hostnames, 2 ips, 2 urls, and 1 isp. Examples: ob.sd559908.js.brandsmat.com, obs.sd559908.js.brandsmat.com.

Recommendation:
- Prioritize family-level correlation around yfdnza.com, youtubeaccount.com. Remaining isolated candidates appear less informative than the repeated family pattern already identified.
